ast.name: addOption
ast.target: Obsidian 基础 (YAML 前置元数据)

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: Markdown (需要 YAML 前置元数据)

ast.name: error
ast.source: Health.md: failed to open data point target
ast.target: Health.md: 打开数据点目标失败

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether this block follows a rolling window, one day, explicit boundaries, or all loaded data.
ast.target: 选择此区块是遵循滚动窗口、单日、明确边界还是所有已加载数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of calendar days to include.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional end date/datetime. Leave blank to end today.
ast.target: 可选的结束日期/日期时间。留空则结束于今天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Date to use for both from and to.
ast.target: 用于起始和结束的日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含开始日期或日期时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含结束日期或日期时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional render height in pixels. Clear to use the plugin default.
ast.target: 可选的渲染高度（像素）。留空则使用插件默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional maximum render width in pixels.
ast.target: 可选的最大渲染宽度（像素）。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 选择一个健康可视化类别…

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Deprecated include of L.Mixin.Events: this property will be removed in future releases, please inherit from L.Evented instead.
ast.target: 已弃用的 L.Mixin.Events 包含：此属性将在未来版本中移除，请改为继承自 L.Evented。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: latlngs are not flat! Only the first ring will be used
ast.target: latlngs 不是扁平的！仅使用第一个环。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Deprecated use of _flat, please use L.LineUtil.isFlat instead.
ast.target: 已弃用的 _flat 用法，请改用 L.LineUtil.isFlat。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Health.md: no source file found for this data point.
ast.target: Health.md：未找到此数据点的源文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Health.md: no date found for this data point.
ast.target: Health.md：未找到此数据点的日期。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Health.md: failed to open data point target.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Last days must be a positive number.
ast.target: 最近几天必须是一个正数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Enter at least a from or to value, or choose another range mode.
ast.target: 请输入至少一个“从”或“至”的值，或选择另一个范围模式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Height must be a positive number.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Width must be a positive number.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How to compare the selected data window.
ast.target: 如何比较选定的数据窗口。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the trend metric and preferred direction.
ast.target: 选择趋势指标和首选方向。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Number of most-recent days in the current period.
ast.target: 当前周期内最近几天的天数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Number of days before the current period used for comparison.
ast.target: 用于比较的当前周期之前的天数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Target active calories for the Move ring.
ast.target: 活动圆环的目标活动卡路里。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Target exercise minutes for the Exercise ring.
ast.target: 锻炼圆环的目标锻炼分钟数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Target stand hours for the Stand ring.
ast.target: 站立圆环的目标站立小时数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose which daily value to render.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Optional goal in the selected metric's units.
ast.target: 所选指标单位的可选目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Draw a dashed average line across the bars.
ast.target: 在柱状图上绘制一条虚线平均线。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose what each day should shade by.
ast.target: 选择每天应按什么着色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the value to bucket by weekday.
ast.target: 选择按星期几分桶的值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Controls bar order and x-axis labels.
ast.target: 控制柱状图顺序和 X 轴标签。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the heart metric for the capsules.
ast.target: 选择胶囊图的心率指标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose oxygen percentage or respiratory-rate data.
ast.target: 选择血氧百分比或呼吸频率数据。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Start of the x-axis window on each night's date.
ast.target: 每晚日期上 X 轴窗口的开始。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: End of the x-axis window on the next day.
ast.target: 次日 X 轴窗口的结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Optional workout day to select, in YYYY-MM-DD format.
ast.target: 可选的锻炼日期，格式为 YYYY-MM-DD。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Zero-based workout number on that day. 0 means first workout.
ast.target: 该日基于零的锻炼编号。0 表示第一次锻炼。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Optional BPM used to draw heart-rate zone bands.
ast.target: 用于绘制心率区间带的可选 BPM。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Color route segments by speed or nearest heart-rate sample.
ast.target: 按速度或最近的心率样本为路线段着色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Primary color for activity charts (steps, breathing, rings)
ast.target: 活动图表（步数、呼吸、圆环）的主色

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Secondary color for calories, asymmetry, and distance
ast.target: 卡路里、不对称性和距离的次色

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 快速眼动睡眠阶段的颜色

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Color for awake periods in sleep charts
ast.target: 睡眠图表中清醒时段的颜色

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Path to the folder containing health data files. Start typing to pick an existing folder.
ast.target: 包含健康数据文件的文件夹路径。开始输入以选择现有文件夹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Opt in to nested data folders. Flat keeps the existing direct-file behavior; nested choices scan up to that depth and also keep direct files loadable for gradual migrations.
ast.target: 选择嵌套数据文件夹。扁平保持现有的直接文件行为；嵌套选项扫描至该深度，并保留直接文件可加载以进行渐进式迁移。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Glob pattern to match file names or nested paths. Use * to include all supported files.
ast.target: 用于匹配文件名或嵌套路径的 Glob 模式。使用 * 包含所有支持的文件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically detect file format by extension. Markdown and bases files must include YAML frontmatter.
ast.target: 通过扩展名自动检测文件格式。Markdown 和 bases 文件必须包含 YAML 前置元数据。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose what happens when clicking a hoverable point in canvas charts.
ast.target: 选择在画布图表中点击可悬停点时发生什么。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose a preset palette or customize individual colors below
ast.target: 选择预设调色板或自定义下方的单个颜色

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Your max heart rate in beats per minute, used to draw heart-rate zone bands on workout charts. Leave blank to skip zone bands. A common estimate is 220 minus your age.
ast.target: 您的最大心率（次/分钟），用于在锻炼图表上绘制心率区间带。留空则跳过区间带。一个常见的估算值是 220 减去您的年龄。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Render workout maps with tile imagery (requires network). When off, the route is drawn as a polyline on a plain background.
ast.target: 使用瓦片图像渲染锻炼地图（需要网络）。关闭时，路线将在纯色背景上绘制为折线。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Leaflet tile URL template. Replace with a different provider's URL if you have your own API key.
ast.target: Leaflet 瓦片 URL 模板。如果您有自己的 API 密钥，可以替换为其他提供商的 URL。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Attribution string shown on the map. Required by most tile providers.
ast.target: 地图上显示的归属字符串。大多数瓦片提供商要求此信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Browse every Health.md chart and component.
ast.target: 浏览每个 Health.md 图表和组件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dataset overviews, KPI cards, and trend tiles.
ast.target: 数据集概览、KPI 卡片和趋势瓦片。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move rings, bars, heatmaps, spirals, and weekday patterns.
ast.target: 活动圆环、柱状图、热力图、螺旋图和星期模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Heart-rate terrain, daily ranges, and HRV trends.
ast.target: 心率地形图、每日范围和 HRV 趋势。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Schedules, sleep stages, quality bars, and polar clocks.
ast.target: 作息时间、睡眠阶段、质量条和极坐标时钟。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Workout logs, heart-rate series, and GPS route maps.
ast.target: 锻炼日志、心率序列和 GPS 路线地图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Responsive dataset summary with totals, averages, sleep, and vitals.
ast.target: 响应式数据集摘要，包含总计、平均值、睡眠和生命体征。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apple-style KPI card with sparkline and prior-period comparison.
ast.target: Apple 风格的 KPI 卡片，带有迷你图和前期比较。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trends-tab style card comparing current and prior windows.
ast.target: 趋势标签风格的卡片，比较当前和前期窗口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apple-style Move, Exercise, and Stand rings.
ast.target: Apple 风格的活动、锻炼和站立圆环。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Radial daily rings for steps, active calories, and heart context.
ast.target: 用于步数、活动卡路里和心率上下文的径向每日圆环。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Daily bars with optional goal and average lines.
ast.target: 带有可选目标和平均线的每日柱状图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: GitHub-style calendar grid for activity intensity.
ast.target: 用于活动强度的 GitHub 风格日历网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Radial step-count history, older days inside and newer days outside.
ast.target: 径向步数历史记录，较旧的日期在内，较新的日期在外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Average a metric by day of week.
ast.target: 按星期几对指标取平均值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ridgeline heatmap for heart-rate samples or daily aggregates.
ast.target: 用于心率样本或每日聚合值的脊线热力图。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每日最小/最大/平均心率胶囊图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flowing band of blood oxygen samples across the selected window.
ast.target: 选定窗口内血氧样本的流动带状图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Daily blood oxygen or respiratory-rate min/max range.
ast.target: 每日血氧或呼吸频率的最小/最大范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Respiratory-rate wave for overnight or recovery windows.
ast.target: 用于过夜或恢复窗口的呼吸频率波形图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bedtime-to-wake bars against a sunset/night/sunrise backdrop.
ast.target: 就寝到起床的条形图，背景为日落/夜晚/日出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stacked nightly bars for deep, core, REM, and awake time.
ast.target: 每晚深度、核心、快速眼动和清醒时间的堆叠条形图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Linear sleep-stage timeline with one row per night.
ast.target: 每晚一行的线性睡眠阶段时间线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Clock-face sleep stages for bedtime and wake consistency.
ast.target: 用于评估就寝和起床规律性的钟面式睡眠阶段图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Walking speed and asymmetry in one trend view.
ast.target: 步速与不对称性的综合趋势视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Timeline of workouts in the filtered window.
ast.target: 筛选时间窗口内的锻炼时间线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Heart-rate time series or summary for one selected workout.
ast.target: 单次选定锻炼的心率时间序列或摘要。

ast.name: description
ast.source: GPS route map for one selected outdoor workout.
ast.target: 单次选定户外锻炼的GPS路线图。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自定义文件夹路径模板

ast.name: text
ast.source: Source: daily heart-rate samples within workout time
ast.target: 数据来源：锻炼时间段内的每日心率样本

ast.name: text
ast.source: This visualization does not need extra component parameters.
ast.target: 此可视化不需要额外的组件参数。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Could not pretty-print JSON; showing raw file contents.
ast.target: 无法美化打印JSON；显示原始文件内容。
